mapper.insert: INSERT INTO goods (merchant_id, category_id, goods_name, price, discount_price, img, stock, status, `desc`) VALUES (#{merchantId}, #{categoryId}, #{goodsName}, #{price}, #{discountPrice}, #{img}, #{stock}, #{status}, #{desc})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM goods WHERE goods_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM goods ORDER BY goods_id DESC
